params.goalIds: Array of goal IDs to unlock

params.recipient: Address to receive the funds (defaults to creator if zero)

params.stableToken_: Address of the ERC20 token for payments

params.billServiceIndex: Index of the service provider in billServices array

params.amount: Amount of stable tokens to contribute
params.goalId: ID of the goal to fund
ID of the goal to pull

returns.data: Struct containing goal data and protocol settings

params.user: Address of the user to verify

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.newBillService: The address of the service provider

params.status: True to restrict, false to unrestrict

params.goalId: ID of the goal to flag

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

activeGoals(address).notice: Mapping from user address to their active goal count

approveScholarshipRelease(uint256[]).notice: Clears the lock status for several goals. Only callable by release approver or owner.

backendFulfillmentSigner().notice: Address used to verify off-chain fulfillment or user levels

billListingFee().notice: Fee in absolute token units to list a Bill goal

billServices(uint256).notice: List of registered bill service providers

billSuccessFeeBP().notice: Fee in Basis Points for bill fulfillment relays

claimScholarshipFunds(uint256,address).notice: Claims funds for a scholarship milestone

createBillGoal(uint256,string,string,str.notice: Creates a new goal for bill payment

createGoal(uint256,string,string).notice: Creates a default social impact goal

createScholarshipGoal(uint256,string,str.notice: Creates a new scholarship goal. Requires Level 3 levels.

defaultListingFee().notice: Fee in absolute token units to list a Default goal

fulfillGoal(uint256,uint8).notice: Manually fulfill a goal or update its status

fundGoal(uint256,uint256,string).notice: Allows users to fund an open goal

getGoal(uint256).notice: Retrieves comprehensive details about a goal

getGoalIdAndState(address).notice: Retrieves comprehensive details about a goal

goalCounter().notice: Counter for generating unique goal IDs

goalIDs(address,uint256).notice: Mapping from address to Goal IDs

goals(uint256).notice: Mapping from goal ID to Goal data

maxGoal().notice: Maximum number of active goals allowed per user (0 for unlimited)

milestonePercent(uint8).notice: Stores percentage release for each milestone

onVerificationSuccess(address,uint8).notice: Updates user levels status. Only callable by signer or owner.

reactivateGoal(uint256).notice: Re-opens a goal that was previously closed or canceled

refundScholarship(uint256).notice: Allows donors to claim a proportional refund if scholarship milestones are not met

relayBillFundsToService(uint256,uint256).notice: Relays funds from a raised bill goal to the service provider

releaseApprover().notice: Address authorized to approve milestone releases and relay funds

restrictions(address).notice: Mapping to check if an address has restricted access

scholarshipFeeBP().notice: Fee in Basis Points for scholarship withdrawals

scholarshipListingFee().notice: Fee in absolute token units to list a Scholarship goal

setBackendFulfillmentSigner(address).notice: Sets a new backend fulfillment signer address

setBillService(address).notice: Adds a new registered bill service provider

setMaxGoal(uint256).notice: Sets the maximum goals per user

setReleaseApprover(address).notice: Sets a new release approver address

setRestriction(address,bool).notice: Sets restriction status for an address

stableToken().notice: The stable token used for all transactions (e.g., USDT/USDC)

toggleFlagGoal(uint256).notice: Allows a donor to flag a goal for review if suspicious

treasury().notice: Address where listing and success fees are sent
